title: nullptr dereference in WidthVisitor
body:
[Backtrace](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/18429822/bt.log)

`WidthVisitor::iterate_shift_prelim` dereferences `m_vup`, which is NULL.
```
(gdb) p m_vup
$1 = (WidthVP *) 0x0
```

Can't share the Verilog code that broke it. Will try to create an MRE if I figure out what triggers the bug.

Command used:
```
verilator -j 0 --assert --timing --trace-fst -Wno-fatal --binary -I<redacted> test/<redacted>.v --top <redacted> src/*.v src/spinalhdl_gen/* --debug --gdbbt
```

Version: latest master at time of writing this.
```
Verilator 5.033 devel rev v5.032-37-g20faa9946
```

OS: Fedora 40.
